sections.title: Base

sections.title: Base Rookies
sections.odds: 100 cards. Serial numbered #/399. 1 per pack. · PARALLEL CARDS: Green #/99, Red #/75, Orange #/45, Blue #/35, Black #/15. · PHOTO VARIANTS: Base Photo Variation #/99, Green #/66, Red #/33, Orange #/15, Blue #/3, Black 1/1. · DESIGN VARIANTS: Base Design Variation #/65, Red #/25, Purple 1/1. · DESIGN & PHOTO VARIANTS: Base Design & Photo Variation #/22, Red #/11, Purple 1/1.
